calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar.
EXAMINER: AEYOUNG KIM

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):
Anthony Grillo, Esq., for Roberta Spalding, Petitioner.
No other appearances.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Oct-07-2003 is admitted to probate. Roberta Spalding is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed, with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-07-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
